---
title: "Seed Funding: Augmented Multi-Task Argument Mining"
sort_year: 2026
year: "2024 – 2026"
status: "Ongoing"
funder: "Cyprus University of Technology"
categories: [Media & Social Media Monitoring, Ongoing]
---

**Year:** 2024 – 2026
**Status:** Ongoing
**Funder:** Cyprus University of Technology
**Research Cluster:** Media & Social Media Monitoring
